analysis_identity.title: Beyond Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) Accelerators: Directed Evidence for Adaptive Sustainability Portfolios
analysis_identity.scope: Directed SDG interdependence, ranking robustness, panel local projections, and independent WDI/WHO triangulation.
analysis_identity.primary_conclusion: The SDG system is dense and directional, but no universal accelerator ranking is stable enough for policy use.

panel_granger_network.estimator: Dumitrescu-Hurlin panel Granger non-causality tests on first-differenced SDG goal scores

local_projections.estimator: Panel local projections with Driscoll-Kraay standard errors

claim_rules.supported: Multiplicity-adjusted, directionally consistent evidence within the relevant family.
claim_rules.suggestive: Raw p < 0.05 or prespecified descriptive support that does not meet the supported threshold.
claim_rules.unsupported: Does not meet supported or suggestive rules.
claim_rules.not_interpretable: A diagnostic, mapping, coverage, or minimum-sample gate fails.
